# flashblade_object_store_account_export (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade object store account export by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_object_store_account_export" "example" {
  name = "existing-account/export"
}

output "account_export_enabled" {
  value = data.flashblade_object_store_account_export.example.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The combined name of the export to look up (e.g. 'account/export_name').

### Read-Only

- `account_name` (String) The name of the object store account being exported.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the export is enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the object store account export.
- `policy_name` (String) The name of the S3 export policy applied to the export.
- `server_name` (String) The name of the server the account is exported to.
